The bespoke automation services people ask us for first.

Four flagship engineering automations: 3D plantroom design from sketches, PDF drawings turned into a Revit model, pipework auto-routed to its destinations, and clashes solved (not just reported). Each is a dedicated page; each links straight back into the apps that drive it.

Flagship feature

3D Plantroom Designer

From a brief and a few site photos to a fully-coordinated 3D plantroom in hours, not weeks.

Open 3D Plantroom Designer →
Feature

PDF to 3D Model Conversion

Send a PDF drawing. Get back a Revit model. Coordinated, parameterised, and on your house template.

Open PDF to 3D Model Conversion →
Feature

AutoRoute

Pipework auto-routed to its destinations — coordinated against structure, services and access.

Open AutoRoute →
Feature

Clash Solver

Stops reporting clashes. Starts solving them.

Open Clash Solver →
